name: Chocolate-Bourbon Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix chocolate chips and honey in a 1-1/2 quart casserole or bowl.
Microwave uncovered on high for 1 to 2 minutes, or until chips are melted; stir.
2. Stir in vanilla wafers, walnuts, and bourbon whiskey. Shape into 1-inch balls.
Roll balls in sugar. Store in a tightly covered container up to 10 days.
(Flavor will continue to develop as they stand.) ABOUT 1-1/2 DOZEN CANDIES;
100 CALORIES PER CANDY.
